fixed_prompt: We run a 6-person B2B SaaS company in Kitchener and want to hire one junior ML developer in September. We sell to logistics companies and have one paid pilot, but no formal R&D claim yet. What non-loan programs should we actually pursue?

My partner and I own a small gluten-free bakery in Laval with 8 staff. We need a $95K automated packaging line before holiday season and may add two production workers. Please separate equipment help from hiring help.

I am exploring a small kelp nursery near Prince Rupert, not incorporated yet. I have marine biology experience and a First Nation partner is interested but not committed. What non-loan funding shape would make this fundable?

We operate a licensed daycare in Red Deer with 42 spaces and want to renovate a nearby unit to add 18 infant/toddler spots. The lease is not signed yet. What grants or subsidies fit before we spend money?
I run a 24-person metal fabrication shop in Brandon. We are quoting a $180K welding robot and training two operators so we can take more ag-equipment contracts. I only want non-repayable support.

We are two founders in Saskatoon building sensor software for grain bins. Prototype works on one farm, but we need $120K for field trials and firmware work over winter. Are there verified grants or tax credits that match this stage?

We own a small cidery outside Wolfville and want to launch paid harvest tours next fall. Budget is maybe $28K for signage, booking software, and shoulder-season marketing. Please do not just list generic Nova Scotia business programs.

I am in Fredericton building a cybersecurity compliance tool for US healthcare vendors. We have no revenue yet but two letters of intent from Maine. What non-loan supports fit export validation and product development?
We run a 12-person seafood processor in Souris and need a $240K cold-storage upgrade before lobster season. We also want to reduce power use. What funding is real for PEI processors?

I am a St. John's editor thinking about starting a documentary production company around offshore workers and family life. I have one CBC intro but no corporation. Tell me what non-loan funding would shape the first project.
We run a tiny Whitehorse aurora photo-tour business and want to add winter accessibility gear plus paid training for two guides. Revenue last year was $140K. What non-loan funding should we verify?

Our Yellowknife construction company has 17 employees and wants to build modular wall panels for northern housing projects. First equipment quote is $310K. Are there grants or credits that fit, or is this mostly loans?
I am in Rankin Inlet and want to turn sewing parkas and mitts into a small incorporated workshop with two aunties helping. I have no sales system yet. What non-loan funding path would be realistic?

We are an Ontario clean-tech hardware company selling water sensors and opening a Vancouver sales office for Asia-Pacific customers. We have 38 staff and $4M revenue. What federal non-loan programs fit export and product certification?
My physiotherapy clinic in Windsor has 5 employees and wants to hire a recent grad plus buy $35K in rehab equipment. We are not doing research. What should I pursue without wasting time?

I am a solo game designer in Quebec City with a playable French-language educational game prototype. No company yet, but a school board is interested. What non-loan funding should shape incorporation and first hire?

We run a 31-person sawmill services company in Quesnel and want to replace two diesel forklifts with electric ones plus chargers. Total quote is $210K. What verified non-loan supports are worth chasing?
I want to start a small halal frozen-meal manufacturer in Edmonton. I have recipes, $60K saved, and a grocery buyer willing to sample, but no facility. What business shape unlocks non-loan help?

We are a majority Indigenous-owned tour company near The Pas and want to add cultural day trips for school groups. Budget is $45K for a booking site, guide training, and interpretive materials. What is actually open?

I own a Regina specialty running store with 6 employees and want to build an online fitting tool plus hire a part-time digital marketer. We are profitable but small. Any non-loan funding, or should I self-fund?

We are a 19-person Halifax ocean-tech company developing a battery-powered sensor buoy. We need $260K for testing in rough water and firmware work. Which verified programs fit R&D versus commercialization?
I live near Miramichi and want to open a licensed after-school care program because parents keep asking. I have education experience but no incorporated business. What funding would shape the setup?

We are a UPEI spinout trying to commercialize a diagnostic test for shellfish disease. Two founders, no revenue, lab access secured. I need non-loan options for validation studies and first technical hire.
My family owns a 9-room inn in Twillingate and wants to renovate two rooms for accessible stays before next summer. We also want a new booking engine. Please verify what is open and non-repayable.
I am a Yukon filmmaker with a short documentary idea about remote trades training. I have a producer mentor but no company. What non-loan funding should I line up before filming?
We run a small grocery store in Hay River and our refrigeration power bill is brutal. The contractor quoted $88K for new cases and controls. What grants or rebates could apply?

Our Iqaluit freight startup has 4 employees and wants to buy a used electric cargo van plus charging setup for local deliveries. The quote is about $70K landed. Is there any non-loan support that is not fantasy?

I am thinking of starting a Canadian market-entry consultancy for Latin American food brands. I speak Spanish and have contacts, but no company yet. Are there non-loan programs that should shape the business, or is this too service-based?
We are a 46-person auto-parts supplier in London, Ontario moving into EV battery tray components. Need $140K in CNC training and quality certification. Which programs are strong versus conditional?
Our Longueuil aerospace machine shop has 34 employees and a signed PO if we add a 5-axis machine by March. Quote is $620K. I need non-loan help, especially if hiring apprentices changes the answer.

We are an Indigenous-owned food truck in Campbell River planning a small commercial kitchen and cultural tasting events. Budget is $110K and we already cater local events. What should we pursue first?

We run a small market garden outside Dawson City and want a year-round greenhouse with heat controls. Budget is $160K. What non-loan programs or tax credits are worth verifying?
I want to start a small animation and podcast studio in Yellowknife for northern businesses. I have freelance clients but no corporation. What funding shape makes sense without making things up?
We operate summer boat tours in Pond Inlet and want to train two local guides plus improve our online booking. We are incorporated and revenue is under $100K. What verified non-loan funding exists?

We are a 22-person Canadian AI SaaS company building a privacy-preserving analytics feature for banks. Customers are asking for it but there is real technical uncertainty. What federal programs fit without defaulting to everything?

I am a licensed electrician in Thunder Bay and want to start a small training shop for EV charger installers. No company yet, but two employers said they need workers. What non-loan funding path should I design around?

We are two founders in Vancouver developing a low-cost rehab sensor. Prototype works, no Health Canada submission yet, and a clinic will trial it. What non-loan funding fits validation?
I am not starting a business yet, but I want government grant money to pay for my personal drone pilot training in Alberta. If I maybe freelance later, can Penny find something non-loan?
We own a Winnipeg restaurant and mainly need a $90K cash injection because winter was slow. I know you focus on non-loan money, but include loans too if that is all there is.

Our majority Indigenous-owned construction company near Prince Albert has 9 employees and wants to buy estimating software and train two supervisors. What verified non-loan options fit us specifically?

We make shelf-stable sauces in Cape Breton and have a distributor meeting in Boston in September. Revenue is $900K and we need trade show, label compliance, and samples funding. What is strong versus stretch?
I have a numbered Ontario corporation that buys rental duplexes and I want grants for my next down payment. I do not want tax advice or loans. Is there anything real for this?
